title: 5 Days Tsavo West & Amboseli Safari
description: A short and exciting safari covering Tsavo West and Amboseli National Park, offering diverse landscapes, wildlife encounters, and views of Mount Kilimanjaro.
highlights: Tsavo West – Scenic landscapes and wildlife

itinerary.title: Nairobi to Tsavo West
itinerary.description: Transfer to Tsavo West and check in at Kilaguni Serena Lodge.

itinerary.title: Full Day Tsavo West
itinerary.description: Game drives in Tsavo West exploring wildlife and landscapes.

itinerary.title: Tsavo to Amboseli
itinerary.description: Transfer to Amboseli Serena Safari Lodge.

itinerary.title: Full Day Amboseli
itinerary.description: Game drives with views of Mount Kilimanjaro and elephants.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Return journey and end of safari.

accommodation: Kilaguni Serena Lodge – Tsavo West (2 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Light clothing, sunscreen, hat, and a jacket for mornings.
travelInfo.food: Full board meals at safari lodges.

note: Rates based on 2 pax travelling together.
